original: “I guess it does.”

Azra jumps at your voice, then steadies herself with a deep breath. Calmness restored, she smiles back. It isn’t as gleeful as your own. She seems worried. “Captain, the samples are stored and growing wonderfully. Thanks to you, I obtained a large enough set to offer you an early harvest, should you wish to test their purported effects firsthand.”
You fold your arms and give her a knowing look. “What about yesterday?”

The suula’s wings droop, and she flinches. “Yesterday was... a bit, perhaps. Fun, yes - wonderful even. It was an encounter I’ll treasure till the end of my days, Captain. But as we discussed, we are too busy for idle salaciousness. If we indulge our baser urges...” Azra colors a deep orange, then clears her throat, starting over. “I certainly would not get anything done. How am I supposed to pursue my work if I’m pursuing you?” She sags down, ashamed by her own admission. Hair the color of a fading sunset hides her features.
You brush her hair back and lay your hand on her cheek. What do you tell her?

Azra lights up. “That might work.” Her tail swishes rapidly behind her as she works to justify spending more time between your legs. “However, I’m not sure I could endure waiting until the culminations of our excursions.” She bites her lower lip. “Lovemaking like that leaves one craving for more.”
“Once a day, then,” you suggest. “Less if we’re busy.”

“That might be enough... we’d lose no more than an hour or two on any given day, maybe three or four on weekends...” She ticks off her fingers. “I would have to cut down on other leisure activities, but I could make that work.” She pulls close to you, breathing heavy. “You’re sure about this, right? You’re not just teasing an old, frumpy botanist are you?”

You answer Azra with a kiss. She melts into you. This time, her tongue is gentle, slowly exploring your lips, caressing yours when the romantic entanglement heats up into a full-on french kiss. You taste salt on the edge of her lips, then realize she’s crying. Tears of joy stain the motherly suula’s cheeks, but she doesn’t seem to care. She’s too happy being in your arms and knowing she can be free to finally sate her long-denied arousal.

When you finally part, Azra is wiping the tears from her eyes. “I-I needed that, [pc.name].” She stifles a giggle and straightens, eyes twinkling happily. “I guess that makes you my [pc.boyGirl]friend?”

“Good,” Azra says with a dopey-looking grin. “Because I’m going to be stuck thinking of you like that after this.” She darts forward to give you another kiss, though this one is little more than a quick peck. “Oh, and don’t worry too much about me getting jealous.” Azra’s wings lift proudly. “I’m a suula. I don’t mind if you’re into polyamory or polygamy or polymorphic calculus. So long as you keep making my heart flutter, I’ll be proud to call you my [pc.boyGirl]friend.”

At that, Azra bursts into laughter. “Okay, okay. No pressure. I totally get it. Most suula are polyamorous anyway. I won’t use the label if it bothers you, but I’m not going to stop thinking of you as romance material until you decide to stop making my heart flutter.”
It’s hard to find fault with that school of thought.
“So, is there something I can help you with?” Azra asks, circling you like a shark on the hunt. “Or something I can help you with?”

Azra’s pulls back, eyes moist. “Yes. This will be best.” She places her and upon your shoulder and squeezes it reassuringly. “There are untold worlds to catalogue, and we shall scour them together. Now, is there some other aid I might provide you? Would you like to see your samples?”
You give her a peppy thumbs’ up and consider what you’d like to ask of the giant suula.
You give her your friendliest sounding grunt. What did you want from the giant suula?
You flash a friendly smile and make yourself at home in her quarters. What would you like to ask the giant suula?
You answer with your most disarming grin and nonchalant wave. What did you need from the giant suula?
You shrug and lean back. What did you want from the oversized shark-girl?
